commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the generated Model Aliases prompt sentence and updates the focused system-prompt test to assert exact provider/model guidance.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +3. Total +3 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source emits the old Model Aliases sentence whenever modelAliasLines are present, and the PR body provides before/after generated prompt output for an alias config.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the PR already provides a narrow implementation with no actionable review findings.

target.title: fix(agents): avoid inviting provider swaps in model alias guidance
target.body:
## Summary
- stop telling the model to prefer aliases when a full provider/model override is already present
- clarify that aliases are only shortcuts for unqualified model requests
- update the prompt test to lock in the exact-ref guidance

## Real behavior proof
behavior: with model aliases configured, the generated system prompt was telling the model to prefer an alias even when an exact `provider/model` override was already specified.

environment: a real OpenClaw checkout with the alias config below, comparing the generated system prompt on current `main` versus this branch.

Config used:
```yaml
agents:
  defaults:
    models:
      github-copilot/gpt-4.1:
        alias: copilot-4.1
      openai/gpt-4.1:
        alias: openai-4.1
```

steps:
1. generated the system prompt with the config above on current `main`
2. generated it again on this branch
3. compared the `## Model Aliases` section

evidence:
Prompt excerpt on current `main`:
```text
## Model Aliases
Prefer aliases when specifying model overrides; full provider/model is also accepted.
- copilot-4.1: github-copilot/gpt-4.1
- openai-4.1: openai/gpt-4.1
```

Prompt excerpt on this branch:
```text
## Model Aliases
Use exact provider/model strings verbatim when one is specified. Aliases are shortcuts for unqualified model requests.
- copilot-4.1: github-copilot/gpt-4.1
- openai-4.1: openai/gpt-4.1
```

observedResult: the model-facing prompt no longer tells the model to rewrite an explicit `provider/model` override into an alias.

notTested: I did not run a fully deterministic live provider swap scenario because the downstream behavior depends on model choices after reading the prompt; the proof here is the direct before/after prompt output that drives that behavior.

## Testing
- `pnpm vitest src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`

Closes #61949
